title: feat: enable use_app and app_active quests
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Enables `use_app` (0.25 Pollen, Setup lane) — BYOP login via `byop_client_key_id`; 14,157 users already eligible (~3,540 Pollen retroactive ceiling, granted lazily on dashboard checks)
- Enables `app_active` (Grow lane) with reward tuned 10 → 7 Pollen — 101 eligible app owners today (~707 Pollen ceiling)
- Tunes `app_paid_request` 20 → 15 Pollen but keeps it `coming_soon`; `quest_paid_app_spend` pipe verified deployed + parameterized in both Tinybird workspaces, pending semantic check that `api_key_created_for_user_id` = app owner before enabling
- Bumps quest catalog cache key v22 → v23 (per convention from #12088)
- Updates `test/quests.test.ts` to the new board: catalog pins for the three quests, app-growth grant assertions flipped (26/26 passing)

Both evaluators are pure D1 queries already wired in `EVALUATED_QUESTS` — no new infra.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

gist.headline: Your app made the board
gist.blurb: Two more ways to earn Pollen have wandered out of the greenhouse. Log into a BYOP app or keep one active, and the quest board now knows what to do.
gist.summary: Enabled the Setup-lane `use_app` quest for BYOP logins via `byop_client_key_id` worth 0.25 Pollen, enabled the Grow-lane `app_active` quest at 7 Pollen, and advanced the quest catalog cache key from v22 to v23.
gist.impact: The 14,157 users already eligible for `use_app` can receive its reward lazily during dashboard checks, while 101 current app owners can now earn 7 Pollen for keeping an app active.
gist.visual_concept: Depict the quest board gaining two newly blooming cards: a small BYOP login key for `use_app` and a thriving potted app/code-plant for `app_active`. Polly, wearing a tiny gardener tool belt, pins the cards onto the board while a cheerful CRT monitor robot watches the rewards light up; scattered flowers and a softly glowing Pollen jar make the app-growth metaphor literal.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene in a warm garden hackerspace where Polly, the cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown horizontal stripes, black antennae and oval eyes, pink rectangular cheek blushes, a small smile, and rounded translucent light-blue wings, wears a tiny gardener tool belt while pinning `USE APP 0.25` and `APP ACTIVE 7` cards to a quest board beside a flourishing code-plant; a cute chunky CRT monitor robot looks on excitedly. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic with a prominent soft lime green (#ecf874) and pastel gradient background, chunky retro sprites, pixel flowers, warm lighting, subtle CRT glow, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, nostalgic but beautiful.
